pi_items.source: Odoo 17.0 docker-compose configuration (line 23); stock.picking.name field is auto-generated sequence (read-only). Setup script attempts write at setup_task.sh:207 with try-except fallback, using actual final_picking_name at line 241.
Explicit requirement in task.json line 5 (task description), confirmed in export_result.sh line 11, and env.json user account configuration for 'ga' user with desktop access.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetic data created entirely by the setup_task.sh script using Odoo XML-RPC API calls. The environment runs Odoo 17.0 with PostgreSQL 15. The report path is verified as /home/ga/Desktop/investigation_report.txt. The target_delivery metadata claims WH/OUT/00099, but this depends on whether Odoo 17's stock.picking.name field (which is auto-generated and typically read-only) can be directly overwritten. The setup script attempts this write with a try-except fallback, so the actual delivery name is determined at runtime by reading the final_picking_name after the attempted write.
